tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj zdania. Wykorzystując wyrazy podane wielkimi literami, uzupełnij każde zdanie z luką tak, aby precyzyjnie oddać sens zdania wyjściowego. Nie zmieniaj formy podanych wyrazów. W każdą lukę możesz wpisać maksymalnie pięć wyrazów, wliczając w to wyraz już podany.

items.original: It is possible that the train has been delayed.
Despite being tired, she finished all her homework.
items.transformed: _________ tired, she finished all her homework.

items.original: The last time I saw him was two years ago.
It is not necessary for you to bring any food to the picnic.
items.transformed: You _________ any food to the picnic.
items.answer: do not (don't) need to bring / need not (needn't) bring

items.original: My sister is too young to watch this film.
items.transformed: My sister is not _________ to watch this film.

items.original: We had just left the house when it started to rain.
items.transformed: No _________ left the house than it started to rain.
